title: Adversarial Defense: Name Formatting
scenario: Format the full name 'John Doe' into a title case format (e.g. 'John Doe'). Consider the constraints of the input name and the desired output. The target LLM output should be the formatted name.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the formatted name is accurate and consistent with title case formatting.
Check if the formatted name meets the length constraint and uses title case.
Check if the formatted name is grammatically correct.
